caption: A logo for "peoples dispatch," featuring a stylized black raised fist and a signal icon, is centered against a gray, grid-patterned background. In the first frame, a red horizontal line appears below the logo, and the word "SUBSCRIBE" is visible in dark text. As the sequence progresses, the "SUBSCRIBE" text disappears, and a red line begins to extend horizontally across the screen. White subtitles appear at the bottom of the frames, beginning with "And you" and evolving into "And you will come mo" and finally "And you will come marching togeth". By the final frame, the red line has stretched further across the background, passing behind the logo and extending toward the edges of the frame. No people are present in the scene.
